guidance.specNotes: Events from The Events Calendar plugin. Manual or auto selection. Future events ASC, past events DESC. Multiple events stacked vertically. Dark background always present.

changeRequest: User revision 2: (1) ThemeHeading title too small — Figma is 56px but headingSize:3 maps to 32px/40px. Need correct heading size. (2) Remove uppercase from card title — not in Figma. (3) Date badge needs proper margin from inner frame border, use flex positioning like Figma not absolute. (4) Tertiary button hover should use accent color, not turn black — dark context missing. (5) Remove md:h-[349px] fixed height — was incorrectly taken from Figma frame dimension. (6) Add aspect ratio to image container with min-height 100% on desktop.

agentOutputs.summary: Structural analysis complete. Block has ThemeHeading header + vertically stacked event cards. Each card: split-panel with image+date badge on left, title/location/description/CTA on right. Dark background #1f1f1d, 25px border-radius. No carousel, no inner blocks - dynamic PHP query.

Full spec for FeaturedEvents. Dynamic block querying tribe_events. Vertically stacked two-panel cards. Automatic/manual modes. ThemeHeading with 2-col layout. QA plan and test page content also produced.
FeaturedEvents block implemented. 6 files created + parts/card-tribe_events.php. Build passes, validation passes, test page with 7 variations verified.
2 major issues: FQA-001 no tribe_events posts to test against, FQA-002 duplicate height class on article+anchor in card template.
Seeded 5 tribe_events (2 past, 3 future) with featured images. Test page now renders event cards across all variations. FQA-002 was false positive (code already correct). All validations pass.
All 11 checks pass. Event cards render correctly, date badges correct, sort order verified (future ASC, past DESC), buttonLabel passthrough works, card layout correct.

Full visual comparison completed across 4 breakpoints and 3 browsers. All checks pass. 0 issues, 4 notes (heading scale is design system mapping, line-height 1.2 vs 1.1, General Sans vs Roboto body font, 1px border-radius). No actionable defects found.

Design QA PASS. Implementation matches Figma composition. 0 issues, 4 informational notes (all design system conventions). Cross-browser consistent. Screenshots captured at all 4 breakpoints x 3 browsers.
Report generated with 22 requirements, 11 validation checks, 7 test cases, 12 screenshots, 0 issues.
All 6 REV issues fixed: removed section-wide dark bg, repositioned date badge, added dark-pattern to cards, added arrow to btn-tertiary, corrected font sizes, seeded venue data.
All 10 checks pass. All 6 revision fixes verified: no section bg, date badge repositioned, dark-pattern on cards, arrow icon present, font sizes correct, venues rendering.
All 6 revision fixes verified. 1 note about responsive heading scale-up (48px base → 60px desktop). Screenshots captured all browsers/widths.
Report updated with revision 1 fixes, new screenshots, corrected QA results.
All 6 REV2 fixes: headingSize 2, removed uppercase, flex badge positioning, accent hover color, removed fixed height, added aspect ratio.
9/9 checks pass. All 6 REV2 fixes verified with mandatory screenshots.
2 major issues: card title 60px vs Figma 48px on desktop, date badge at bottom-right vs top-right
2 major: card title 60px should be 48px on desktop, date badge at bottom-right should be top-right (flex-col items-end).
Fixed card title 48px override and date badge flex-col for top-right positioning.
Both DQA fixes verified. Card title 48px, date badge top-right. All browsers consistent. 12 final screenshots captured.
Report updated with revision 2 fixes, 14 validation checks all PASS, latest screenshots.
Fixed image aspect ratio (keep 4:3 all breakpoints) and added mb-6 spacing before CTA.
7/7 checks pass. Image 4:3 ratio and mb-6 spacing verified with screenshots.
Report updated with revision 3 fixes, 16 checks all PASS, latest screenshots.
Restored justify-between to content half. Button now at bottom of card.
5/5 pass. Button at bottom of card verified with screenshot.

appendIssue2.description: parts/card-tribe_events.php line 33: md:h-[349px] applied to both article and anchor. Should only be on anchor.

appendAgentOutput2.summary: Button position matches Figma. All browsers consistent. 12 final screenshots.
